textByHashes.de93311ed7d3b9ab9078fe6b73fd4a52cc319ce3: I hope you found those awful hooligan cultists! I simply cannot sleep at night knowing they're loose!
textByHashes.3db4a6f72b5005d02d0b4c32f6814f6fb4c872fc: I don't know, honestly I don't. There are some very odd folk around these parts.
textByHashes.a45391dfaacd8adb6aa3d37672608129dd24c1b7: Oh, hello again adventurer. I trust you did not have too much trouble dealing with those hooligans?
textByHashes.536ba16c8d9910d73be7859bf460b776491a5fb4: You! Don't think you can go accusing our trusted staff and then waltz up to me as though nothing has happened!
textByHashes.1ee4143ba3f217cd2013fee857c7c2c81a8d9479: HA! Don't be so ridiculous! Next you'll be trying to tell me Jones murdered our old butler!
textByHashes.5e0eba441adc5a5649214f89dfaa32401d89035c: Humph. You really are useless aren't you?
textByHashes.67397c0d096ff4b916f31e69f2a61b9ecde62748: No, no I am very far from OK. Those hooligans slaughtered my precious Scruffy! I shall never recover! I am emotionally scarred for life!
textByHashes.a541265ec93c164e77c85b75b28c93bb1403e284: I'm sorry. I am far too depressed to talk to anybody right now. Oh... poor Scruffy...
textByHashes.cb09ee84a456d6510b35053a3650c2dd6a15d203: Oh, hello. I'm afraid I'm not very presentable at the moment. I've been under incredible stress of late! It's ruining my complexion!
textByHashes.63d0bec11faadea48ee3f8dd005fda2672b3af83: It's those awful cultists! I just don't feel safe here anymore!
textByHashes.e1cc5481848a3b1c443d747704390ecc5ea2ea83: You! Don't think you can go around insulting our trusted staff and then waltz up to me as though nothing has happened!
textByHashes.36c73eb8d4c2b1f703aa8a2db3792f2e3f4f7a34: Ha! Don't be so ridiculous! Next you'll be trying to tell me that Jones murdered our old butler!
textByHashes.17d81fbdd0b97171a2f90a679a2256fe246182a5: Hello again, adventurer. Since you dealt with those horrible cultists, things have vastly improved for us around here!
textByHashes.8100619bdc0c588f3f575f89ff832cbabef5a873: Oh, hello. I hope you've found those awful cultists! I simply cannot sleep at night knowing they're loose!
textByHashes.1f98244a04d7508efd7e1ef04eaac9f207e0bff2: Well you really are useless, aren't you?
textByHashes.c2090a694b006e921a0a3c61cfcc14cd6b012770: Those hooligans! They slaughtered my precious Scruffy! I shall never recover! I am emotionally scarred for life!
textByHashes.44ff90b8e2d77680f42667496d47b9ba73825305: I'm sorry. I am far too upset to talk to anybody right now. Oh... poor Scruffy...
textByHashes.d2fdcf706e319eac3b197149df2e55e2fedd0c86: How could this happen? How? Will our pain never end?
textByHashes.2d6b07210147d7c072726b15122dac7667256c55: Leave me at once! I don't want to talk right now.
textByHashes.8b8f0eab2e0c7b34d11e06ea16147dbb5fd7a7df: My dear husband... how could this happen? Will our pain never end?
textByHashes.e65b2197480a407f67d9755684772608afd5a3c5: Please, leave me. I would mourn alone.
textByHashes.8e9fb3e2dd3e2a02798d8e026c540b14c771549f: Please, leave me. If you have questions, take them to the guard outside.
textByHashes.8da18ba109a3e9da1240db6c6820328f336cc76b: You're the one my husband hired to deal with that cult. Some good that did!
textByHashes.38510c2d715c59cdd243ae5b85b5943744e47d31: Fine. What do you want to know?
textByHashes.8ca2d903448640dfc4dedfd1801e1d9615ea02a6: No. It's as I told the guard. There was a noise coming from Jones' old room. My husband went to take a look and I heard him shout something.
textByHashes.a9111a8d08cf50851ac78fa0c8e0cc2d0105b203: I didn't. I went to see what was happening, and I heard a scream. By the time I arrived, the only one there was my husband, lying on the floor.
textByHashes.17a2b73334f6f8e25f441f62583add442c034d67: Please, do not disturb me. The loss of my husband is a hard burden to bear. I would prefer not to have distractions.
textByHashes.06b8e9aa802563a6fb4a60007676334d3d937fd9: Oh, hello. If you wish to look around the Carnillean family home, please refrain from touching anything with those grubby hands of yours.
textByHashes.a1f3b0e3b1928a7d6a634dbdb7abe7ed2d3c280b: Oh, it's you. I'm very disappointed that you never found those awful cultists. You're quite useless really, aren't you?
